title: Simple Client Base
description: This library mod added a module management system for Minecraft.
body:
This mod is the official NeoForge remastered version of the [Vape Manager Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/vape-manager-reborn) mod and also serves as the foundational framework for SimpleClient. It has been open-sourced on GitHub.

Here are the modifications made to the original mod:

| Feature | VapeManagerReborn | SimpleClientBase |
|---------|------------------|-------------------|
| **Configuration File Location** | config/vmr | config/scb |
| **Built-in Features** | ModuleList, RainbowGui | ModuleList, RainbowGui, HUD, FullBright, NoPumpkinOverlay, NoUnderOverlay, Zoom, and a total of twenty-two built-in features |
| **Number of Module Events** | Nine | Thirty-two |

In addition to these changes, this mod has added the LastServer and AltManager features, as well as a new module toggle configuration interface. You can access this interface by pressing the **Right Ctrl** key. Within this interface, you can open the configuration interface for a specific module by pressing **Shift + Click** on the module or clicking the ">" symbol to the right of the module.

For the AltManager feature, you can find the button in the upper right corner of the game and click it to enter. By default, AltManager only includes the game account used to launch the game. You can add custom offline game accounts using the **Add** or **Add10RandomAlts** buttons. For accounts that have already been added, you can delete or modify them by clicking the **Remove** or **Edit** button to the right of the corresponding game account.

Other "Simple Client" mod: 
- Simple Client Commands: [[GitHub]](https://github.com/yiyuyan/SimpleClientCommands)[[MCMOD]](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17131.html)
- Simple Client Modules: [[GitHub]](https://github.com/yiyuyan/SimpleClientModules)[[MCMOD]](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17226.html)
